caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt while sitting in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which bears the text " Rode Professional Studio Microphone". The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with vertical ridges. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks into the microphone, his mouth opening wide in an expressive gesture of surprise or emphasis. He looks toward someone or something off-screen to his right. In the final moments, he raises his left hand, gesturing with an open palm. His facial expression shifts from a focused speaking state to one of active explanation, while the equipment and studio setting remain static throughout the scene.
